title: Agentic AI in IT Delivery
description: Request regarding the use or implementation of Agentic AI within IT delivery processes. Further details are not provided.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Agentic AI in IT Delivery (DEM-2026-0006)

Executive Summary  
This project explores the integration of Agentic AI within IT delivery processes to enhance automation and decision-making. Implementation aims to improve efficiency and responsiveness in infrastructure management.

Business Value/Impact  
Agentic AI can streamline workflows, reduce manual intervention, and accelerate project delivery timelines, resulting in cost savings and higher service quality. It supports scalable IT operations aligned with evolving business demands.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium-level risks include AI reliability and unintended process disruptions. Robust testing, phased deployment, and continuous monitoring will minimize operational impact and ensure system stability.
